Service.title: Service
Service.description: A construction service offered by the company.

description.description: A brief description of the service.

icon.description: The name of the Lucide icon to use.

order.description: The display order of the service.

Project.title: Project
Project.description: A construction project completed by the company.

category.description: The category of the project (e.g., Commercial, Residential, Civil).

image.description: The URL of the project image.

order.description: The display order of the project.

Message.title: Message
Message.description: A contact message sent by a user from the website.

email.description: The email address of the sender.

createdAt.description: The ISO string timestamp of when the message was sent.

read.description: Whether the message has been read.

role.description: The role or company of the client.

avatar.description: The URL of the client's avatar image.

order.description: The display order of the testimonial.

HeroSettings.title: HeroSettings
HeroSettings.description: Settings for the main hero section on the home page.

image.description: The URL of the background image.

titlePart1.description: The first part of the main title.

titlePart2.description: The highlighted/stroked part of the main title.

titlePart3.description: The third part of the main title.

subtitle.description: The subtitle text below the main title.

AboutSettings.title: AboutSettings
AboutSettings.description: Settings for the about section on the home page.

image.description: The URL of the about section image.

CtaSettings.title: CtaSettings
CtaSettings.description: Settings for the CTA section on the home page.

title.description: The title of the CTA section.

subtitle.description: The subtitle of the CTA section.

buttonText.description: The text for the CTA button.

buttonLink.description: The link for the CTA button.

StatsSettings.title: StatsSettings
StatsSettings.description: Settings for the Stats section on the home page.

/services/{serviceId}.description: Stores the list of services offered.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Stores the list of completed projects.

/messages/{messageId}.description: Stores the contact messages received from the website.
